subcategory: clip-path media gallery with artistic frames
use_cases: Displaying portfolio or creative work with custom-shaped image frames
Creating visually engaging media galleries with organic clip-path effects
Showcasing product or project media with artistic framing on landing pages
Building visual content sections with mixed image and video support
Adding distinctive visual interest to media grids using CSS clip-paths
ai_summary: A media gallery component that displays images and videos within custom CSS clip-path shapes, creating artistic squiggly and geometric frame effects. Uses SVG-defined clip paths for unique visual presentations and supports both image and video media types with configurable clip shapes like 'squiggle', 'rect', and 'another'.
